comments: Applies multidataset gate thresholds and dataset-count requirements
Config rows define non-KNU dataset metadata and ingestion status
KNU actual dataset is derived from the private data contract
Metadata frame exposes status blockers review flags and derived-DW semantics
Rootzone theta EC and slab-weight diagnostics are local-only fixture inputs
Reusable graph bundles are spec-first and PNG-only by repo contract
